- [ ] US1 — Add `graph workflow init` and a workflow asset manifest: bootstrap repo-local delegated-workflow support with a machine-readable manifest and summary.
- [ ] US2 — Seed baseline repo graph knowledge during workflow init: load standard repo artifacts into graph memory for delegated-task orientation.
- [ ] US3 — Install and refresh composable workflow assets while preserving repo overrides: add transparent workflow snippets/helpers without clobbering local conventions.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH3-graph-backed-delegated-workflow/epics/E1-workflow-bootstrap-and-assets/stories/`
